topics.label: CommercializationPerformanceVault
topics.summary: Receives and tracks commercialization-performance capital as a vault rail.

topics.label: ProofRewardsVault
topics.summary: Holds reward capital for proof work, reviewers, and accepted work flows.

topics.label: LiquidityVault
topics.summary: Separates liquidity support from proof, security, and community vaults.

topics.label: SecurityVault
topics.summary: Sets aside funds for security and resilience-related protocol obligations.

topics.label: CommunityVault
topics.summary: Supports ecosystem/community allocations without mixing with proof settlement rails.

topics.label: ProofSeedRegistry
topics.summary: Records seed-level proof metadata used to initialize or identify proof objects.

topics.label: LegacyAGIJobManagerRegistry
topics.summary: Bridges legacy AGIJobManager lifecycle references into the GoalOS-native regime.

topics.label: ReputationRegistry
topics.summary: Records reputation updates arising from accepted work, reviewer history, and disputes.

topics.label: ReferralRegistry
topics.summary: Records referral and attribution links for ecosystem growth or contribution tracking.

topics.label: ProofCardRegistry
topics.summary: Mints or records proof-card style objects after successful review/signoff.

topics.label: ProofCredentialRegistry
topics.summary: Records credentials linked to proof acceptance and reviewer/worker identity.

topics.label: JobRegistry
topics.summary: Defines bounded jobs, reward terms, liability constraints, and release mechanics.

topics.label: JobClaimBondManager
topics.summary: Handles bonds associated with job claims and claimant accountability.

topics.label: PremiumAccessRegistry
topics.summary: Tracks premium/protocol access state without making public demos require an account.

topics.label: ProofSubmissionRegistry
topics.summary: Connects submitted proof to review, approval, credential issuance, and reward release paths.

topics.label: ReviewerBondRegistry
topics.summary: Models reviewer bonds, approvals, challenge windows, and slashing conditions.

topics.label: TreasuryRouter
topics.summary: Routes protocol fees and allocations across the vault family.

topics.label: ProtocolConfigRegistry
topics.summary: Stores protocol-level configuration parameters and guardrail values.

topics.label: LaunchGateRegistry
topics.summary: Represents stage/launch gates before sensitive activation paths can proceed.

topics.label: DisputeRegistry
topics.summary: Records disputes raised against signoffs, claims, credentials, or settlement decisions.

topics.label: AppealRegistry
topics.summary: Provides an appeal layer after disputed outcomes or adverse determinations.

topics.label: SponsorRegistry
topics.summary: Tracks sponsors that support work, reviewers, missions, or protocol participation.

topics.label: BuilderProfileRegistry
topics.summary: Records builder profiles so work histories can become inspectable over time.

topics.label: CredentialRevocationRegistry
topics.summary: Records revocation events so bad or superseded credentials do not remain authoritative.

topics.label: AEPAgentRegistry
topics.summary: Registers agent identities and their permitted participation boundaries.

topics.label: AEPArtifactRegistry
topics.summary: Records hashes and references for artifacts submitted as evidence.

topics.label: AEPGoalOSCommitRegistry
topics.summary: Records commitments to brief, success criteria, constraints, authority, and boundaries.

topics.label: AEPRunCommitmentRegistry
topics.summary: Records commitments for a particular execution run before outputs are accepted.

topics.label: AEPProofLedger
topics.summary: Maintains a ledger of proof events and state transitions.

topics.label: AEPEvalRegistry
topics.summary: Records evaluation outputs, baseline comparisons, and review-relevant checks.

topics.label: AEPAttestationRegistry
topics.summary: Records reviewer, evaluator, or authorized-party attestations.

topics.label: AEPSelectionGate
topics.summary: Controls when a candidate proof/work object can be promoted or selected.

topics.label: AEPRolloutRouter
topics.summary: Routes accepted work toward bounded rollout lanes after gate satisfaction.

topics.label: AEPRollbackRegistry
topics.summary: Records rollback duties and rollback-state evidence for governed releases.

topics.label: AEPEvidenceDocketRegistry
topics.summary: Records docket, claims matrix, public/private boundaries, cost ledger, and risk ledger hashes.

topics.label: AEPProofBundleRegistry
topics.summary: Records proof bundle identifiers and hash commitments tying evidence to acceptance.

topics.label: AlphaWorkUnitLedger
topics.summary: Tracks accepted work units that can inform reputation, reward, or future allocation.

topics.label: MandateEpochRegistry
topics.summary: Records mandate epochs so governance contexts and permissions are time-bounded.

topics.label: AGIEthNamespaceRegistry
topics.summary: Maintains Ethereum namespace references for AGI/GoalOS protocol objects.

topics.label: AEPConformanceRegistry
topics.summary: Records conformance status against AEP or GoalOS rules.

topics.label: AEPClaimBoundaryRegistry
topics.summary: Defines what a proof, credential, or Signoff is and is not allowed to claim.

topics.label: AEPReplayRegistry
topics.summary: Records replay commitments and independent replay evidence.

topics.label: AEPCommitRevealValidationRegistry
topics.summary: Supports commit/reveal validation patterns for challenge-resistant proof checks.

topics.label: AEPEvaluatorStakingRegistry
topics.summary: Models evaluator stakes that can secure review and challenge processes.

topics.label: AEPSlashingCourt
topics.summary: Handles evidence-backed slashing cases for evaluator or reviewer misconduct.

topics.label: AEPRewardVault
topics.summary: Pays or records rewards associated with proof bundles and accepted work units.

topics.label: AEPChronicleRegistry
topics.summary: Records accepted proof/work events as institutional memory.

topics.label: AEPFalsificationRegistry
topics.summary: Records falsification attempts, challenge evidence, and counter-claims.
